span.p:
Central Data Store
SQLite / SQLiteCloud Database
DATABASE_URL

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Core Tables
• User (soldier/clerk/adjutant + approval)
• LoginSession
• FitnessPlan
• AssignedPlan
• FitnessTest
• Report
• IpftDate

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Soldier Module
• View fitness status
• View assigned plan & exercises
• View IPFT schedule/results
• Profile/BMI view

div.style: color: rgb(11, 31, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Clerk Module
• Record fitness tests
• Justify results
• Assign plans
• Send reports to adjutant
• View analytics

div.style: color: rgb(11, 31, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Adjutant Module
• Approve soldiers
• Set IPFT date
• View reports
• View high-risk soldiers
• Dashboard analytics

div.style: color: rgb(46, 16, 101) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Authentication Module
• Login
• Signup
• JWT token issue/verify
• Password hashing (bcryptjs)
• Session logging

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Fitness & Plans Module
(Next.js APIs)
• Manage FitnessPlan
• AssignedPlan
• Status calculation
• Charts/trends

div.style: color: rgb(46, 16, 101) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Reports Module
• New-soldiers reports
• Clerk reports
• Read/mark reports

div.style: color: rgb(76, 5, 25) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
High-Risk Soldiers Module
• Identify 'Unfit' soldiers
• Provide risk listing output

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Batch/Admin Scripts
• setup-cloud-db.mjs
• add-sample-plan.mjs
• import-soldiers-to-db.js
• export-db-json.js
• inspect-*.js
• migrate-users-to-prisma.js
